decision: Gate E passed for repo-local operational validation.
summary: Reviewed the Phase 4 operational validation report: three live localhost iterations passed, provider drift count was zero, evidence integrity was clean, green reliability artifacts remained within thresholds, and no forbidden side effects were recorded.
recommendation_for_human: Proceed to the provider adapter kernel activation proposal only; do not start paid provider calls, subscription CLI daemonization, external repo mutation, deploy, PR creation, or yellow auto-approval from this gate.
notes: Gate E pass authorizes drafting the next bounded activation proposal, not broader runtime autonomy.
